name: DELTA AIR LINES, INC.
summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. is a major U.S. air carrier providing passenger and cargo air transportation services. The company operates an airline network and also runs a refinery segment. Delta offers domestic and international flights, serving a broad range of markets. Its business includes ancillary services tied to its core air travel operations.

products.name: Passenger Air Transportation
products.description: Domestic and international passenger flight services operated under the Delta brand.

products.name: Cargo Air Transportation
products.description: Air freight and cargo services offered alongside passenger operations.

products.name: Refinery Segment
products.description: Delta operates a refinery segment supporting its fuel supply needs.
